user.title: Connect to Smart Meter Gateway
user.description: Enter your SMGW HAN interface credentials. The integration will fetch certified daily meter readings once per day.

data_description.url: URL of the SMGW HAN interface (default: https://192.168.100.100/cgi-bin/hanservice.cgi)
data_description.taf7_profile_name: Name of the TAF7 evaluation profile as configured in the SMGW
data_description.update_time: Time of day for the automatic daily data fetch

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the SMGW. Check the URL and network connection.
error.invalid_profile: TAF7 profile not found or meter ID could not be read. Check the profile name.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the SMGW. Check the URL and network connection.
error.invalid_profile: TAF7 profile not found or meter ID could not be read. Check the profile name.
